title: Diospyros discolor
taxonomy: Diospyros discolor is classified within the family Ebenaceae and is a species of the genus Diospyros. The Ebenaceae family, to which Diospyros discolor belongs, is a small family of flowering plants. Diospyros discolor is a type of evergreen tree native to Asia. It is a member of the order Ericales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. Diospyros discolor is also commonly known as the persimmon tree due to its fruit.
